Module com.example._0tazo
Package com.example._0tazo.model

Class AbstractPlayer

java.lang.Object
com.example._0tazo.model.AbstractPlayer
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPlayer
Direct Known Subclasses:
ComputerPlayer, HumanPlayer
public abstract class AbstractPlayer extends Object implements IPlayer
Abstract base implementation of IPlayer that manages the shared state and logic common to all player types in the Cincuentazo game.

The player's hand is stored as an ArrayList of up to 4 cards. Concrete subclasses only need to implement:

  • IPlayer.chooseCard(int) â€” card selection strategy.
  • IPlayer.isFaceUpDraw() â€” whether drawn cards are revealed.
See Also:
  • IPlayer
  • HumanPlayer
  • ComputerPlayer

  • Field Details

    • HAND_SIZE

      public static final int HAND_SIZE
      The fixed number of cards every player holds in their hand.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • name

      private final String name
      The player's display name.

    • hand

      private final ArrayList<Card> hand
      The player's hand stored as an ArrayList. Its size is always between 0 and 4.

    • active

      private boolean active
      Whether this player is still active in the game.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractPlayer

      public AbstractPlayer(String name)
      Constructs a player with the given name and an empty hand.
      Parameters:
      name - the display name of this player; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • receiveCard

      public void receiveCard(Card card)
      Adds a card to the hand. Used during the initial deal.
      Specified by:
      receiveCard in interface IPlayer
      Parameters:
      card - the Card to receive

    • playCard

      public Card playCard(int index, Deck deck) throws GameException
      Plays the card at the given index: removes it from the hand, sends it to the discard pile, and returns it so the caller can update the table sum.
      Specified by:
      playCard in interface IPlayer
      Parameters:
      index - the hand index (0â€“3) of the card to play
      deck - the Deck whose discard pile receives the card
      Returns:
      the Card that was played
      Throws:
      GameException.PlayerEliminatedException - if this player is eliminated
      GameException - if the index is out of range

    • drawCard

      public void drawCard(Deck deck) throws GameException
      Draws the top card from the main deck and adds it to the hand. Whether the card is face up or face down depends on the concrete implementation.
      Specified by:
      drawCard in interface IPlayer
      Parameters:
      deck - the Deck to draw from
      Throws:
      GameException.PlayerEliminatedException - if this player is eliminated
      GameException.EmptyDeckException - if the deck is empty
      GameException - if both the main deck and discard pile are empty

    • eliminate

      public void eliminate(Deck deck)
      Eliminates this player: sends all remaining hand cards to the discard pile face down and marks the player as inactive.
      Specified by:
      eliminate in interface IPlayer
      Parameters:
      deck - the Deck that receives the eliminated player's cards

    • hasLegalMove

      public boolean hasLegalMove(int currentSum)
      Returns true if this player has at least one card that can legally be played without the table sum exceeding 50.
      Specified by:
      hasLegalMove in interface IPlayer
      Parameters:
      currentSum - the current table sum
      Returns:
      true if a legal move exists

    • getCard

      public Card getCard(int index)
      Returns the card at the given hand index.
      Specified by:
      getCard in interface IPlayer
      Parameters:
      index - the hand index (0â€“3)
      Returns:
      the Card at that index, or null if not found

    • getHand

      public ArrayList<Card> getHand()
      Returns a copy of the hand list.
      Specified by:
      getHand in interface IPlayer
      Returns:
      a shallow copy of the hand as an ArrayList

    • handSize

      public int handSize()
      Returns the number of cards currently in the hand.
      Specified by:
      handSize in interface IPlayer
      Returns:
      the card count, between 0 and HAND_SIZE

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the player's display name.
      Specified by:
      getName in interface IPlayer
      Returns:
      the name of this player

    • isActive

      public boolean isActive()
      Returns true if this player is still active in the game.
      Specified by:
      isActive in interface IPlayer
      Returns:
      true if active, false if eliminated
